_comment_routes: Rewrite every /trace/<uuid> request to the single placeholder HTML built by Astro for the [id].astro dynamic route. The TracePage React component reads the real ID from window.location.pathname at hydration. This is the static-build pattern for client-rendered dynamic routes on Azure Static Web Apps.
_comment_navigationFallback: When a user reloads any other unknown path (or pastes a deep link), serve index.html so client-side routing handles it. This is the standard SPA fallback.
